hooks.command: cd task-2-pipeline && dotnet test tests/BankingPipeline.Tests.csproj --collect:"XPlat Code Coverage" --results-directory ./TestResults --verbosity quiet 2>&1 && COVERAGE=$(grep -o 'line-rate="[0-9.]*"' ./TestResults/*/coverage.cobertura.xml 2>/dev/null | head -1 | grep -o '[0-9.]*' | head -1) && PERCENT=$(python3 -c "print(int(float('${COVERAGE:-0}') * 100))") && echo "Coverage: ${PERCENT}%" && if [ "$PERCENT" -lt 80 ]; then echo "BLOCKED: Coverage ${PERCENT}% is below 80% gate" && exit 1; else echo "PASSED: Coverage ${PERCENT}% meets 80% gate"; fi
